title: Thingamajigs 2 Railroadways
description: Adds crossing components like bells and gates to your world!
body:
**Welcome to Thingamajigs 2 Railroadways!** An addon for Thingamajigs 2 (NeoForge) that adds railroad crossings to your worlds!

![Animated Image of a crossing gate going up and down with flashing lights](https://bonincreativemedia.gitbook.io/thingamajigs-docs/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1211951119-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FLy9ZlxaUXoVDn3imWfry%252Fuploads%252FzuJOg5AwK6SiPD2DPws4%252Frr_crossing_setup_newer.gif%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3De4f91fb2-28d6-465d-9fd9-155acb2c4e1c&width=800&dpr=2&quality=100&sign=ffd26182&sv=2) ![crossing bells of various metallic types being shown from below pointed towards the sky](https://bonincreativemedia.gitbook.io/thingamajigs-docs/~gitbook/image?url=https%3A%2F%2F1211951119-files.gitbook.io%2F%7E%2Ffiles%2Fv0%2Fb%2Fgitbook-x-prod.appspot.com%2Fo%2Fspaces%252FLy9ZlxaUXoVDn3imWfry%252Fuploads%252Fze0MeYjieHPQD7z6u9uT%252Fbellredesigns1.png%3Falt%3Dmedia%26token%3Dc2b3b0aa-b488-4938-957e-9a0c9f1b5e7f&width=200&dpr=2&quality=100&sign=5302fd81&sv=2)

**This mod adds:**
- Cantilevers (with lights or without, supports redstone on top, and many variants)
- Lights (alternating red lights, controlled using vertical redstone poles)
- Gates (go up and down with redstone signals, and has variants for lighted and non-lighted)
- Many Mechanical and Electronic Bells (custom made sounds)
- Dynamic Crossbuck Sign (supports custom textures and can be rotated freely, and can power vertical redstone components above it)

_Note!_ **You need Thingamajigs 2 For NeoForge to run this mod, as Railroadways runs off code and assets from it.**
